title: Tough As Nails - Compatibility Pack
description: Adds compatibility between Tough As Nails and several other mods
body:
Adds items from several other mods to Tough As Nails tags.  
Currently supported mods:
- [Farmer's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight)
